text:
<<On Wed, 3 Jul 1996 01:43:41 -0700 (PDT), fn@uidaho.edu said:

> -		errx(1, "interface %s does not exist..", name);
> +		errx(1, "interface %s does not exist...", name);
 	
Make that:

 +		errx(1, "interface %s does not exist", name);

-GAWollman

MIT, LCS, ANA, or NSA| who like Shashish.  - Claude McKenzie + Florent Vollant
